basics.description: Deploy **Seqera Platform** on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS). This wizard guides you through the essential configuration parameters.

basics.name: createNewCluster
basics.label: Create new AKS cluster?
basics.toolTip: Create a new AKS cluster or use an existing one.

elements.name: existingClusterResourceName
elements.label: AKS Cluster Name
elements.toolTip: Select an existing AKS cluster from this resource group.

elements.name: newClusterResourceName
elements.label: AKS cluster name
elements.toolTip: Use only allowed characters

constraints.validationMessage: Only alphanumeric characters are allowed, and the value must be 6-30 characters long.

elements.name: kubernetesVersion
elements.label: Kubernetes version
elements.toolTip: The version of Kubernetes that should be used for this cluster. You will be able to upgrade this version after creating the cluster.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: VM size
elements.toolTip: The size of virtual machine for VM.

elements.name: osSKU
elements.label: OS SKU
elements.toolTip: The SKU of Linux OS for VM.

elements.name: enableAutoScaling
elements.label: Enable auto scaling
elements.toolTip: Enable auto scaling

elements.name: vmCount
elements.label: VMCount
elements.toolTip: Specify VM count

elements.name: platformExternalDomain
elements.label: Platform External Domain
elements.toolTip: Domain where Seqera Platform will be accessible (e.g. seqera.example.com).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid domain name.

elements.name: licenseString
elements.label: Platform License Key
elements.toolTip: License key provided by your Seqera account manager.

elements.name: extensionResourceName
elements.label: Cluster extension resource name
elements.toolTip: Only lowercase alphanumeric characters are allowed, and the value must be 6-30 characters long.

constraints.validationMessage: Only lowercase alphanumeric characters are allowed, and the value must be 6-30 characters long.

elements.name: createNewDatabase
elements.label: Automatically provision Azure Database for MySQL
elements.toolTip: When checked, a new Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server will be created with separate databases for Platform and Pipeline Optimization.

elements.name: mysqlServerName
elements.label: MySQL Server Name
elements.toolTip: Globally unique name for the MySQL Flexible Server (3-63 lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-63 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, starting and ending with a letter or number.

elements.name: mysqlLocation
elements.label: MySQL Server Region
elements.toolTip: Azure region for the MySQL Flexible Server. Defaults to the deployment region (same as AKS cluster).

elements.name: mysqlAdminUsername
elements.label: MySQL Admin Username
elements.toolTip: Administrator login for the MySQL server.

constraints.validationMessage: Must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores (max 32 characters).

elements.name: mysqlAdminPassword
elements.toolTip: Administrator password for the MySQL server.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 8-128 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a digit, and a special character.

elements.name: mysqlSkuName
elements.label: MySQL SKU
elements.toolTip: Compute SKU for the MySQL Flexible Server. General Purpose SKUs use 4 GiB RAM per vCore; Memory Optimized SKUs use 8 GiB RAM per vCore.
elements.defaultValue: General Purpose – D4ds_v4 (4 vCores, 16 GiB RAM)

allowedValues.label: General Purpose – D4ds_v4 (4 vCores, 16 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D8ds_v4 (8 vCores, 32 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D16ds_v4 (16 vCores, 64 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D32ds_v4 (32 vCores, 128 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D48ds_v4 (48 vCores, 192 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D64ds_v4 (64 vCores, 256 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E2ds_v4 (2 vCores, 16 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E4ds_v4 (4 vCores, 32 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E8ds_v4 (8 vCores, 64 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E16ds_v4 (16 vCores, 128 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E32ds_v4 (32 vCores, 256 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E48ds_v4 (48 vCores, 384 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E64ds_v4 (64 vCores, 504 GiB RAM)

elements.name: mysqlStorageSizeGB
elements.label: Storage Size (GiB)
elements.toolTip: Storage size for the MySQL server in GiB.

elements.name: mysqlPlatformDatabaseName
elements.label: Platform Database Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the database to create for Seqera Platform.

elements.name: databaseHost
elements.label: MySQL Host
elements.toolTip: Hostname of the MySQL database server.

elements.name: databasePort
elements.label: MySQL Port
elements.toolTip: Port number for the MySQL database.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid port number.

elements.name: databaseName
elements.label: Database Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the MySQL database for Seqera Platform.

elements.name: databaseUsername
elements.label: Database Username
elements.toolTip: MySQL database username.

elements.name: databasePassword
elements.toolTip: MySQL database password.

options.text: Additional JDBC connection options for the MariaDB driver, formatted as key=value pairs separated by '&'. See the MariaDB Connector/J documentation for all available options.

elements.name: databaseConnectionOptions
elements.label: MySQL Connection Options
elements.toolTip: JDBC connection options passed to the MariaDB driver, formatted as key=value pairs separated by '&'.

options.text: Platform requires a non-clustered Redis endpoint. The auto-provisioned Azure Managed Redis instance uses the NoCluster topology. If you bring your own Redis, ensure it is non-clustered.

elements.name: createNewRedis
elements.label: Automatically provision Azure Cache for Redis (Platform)
elements.toolTip: When checked, a new Azure Cache for Redis (Standard tier, non-clustered) will be created for Platform.

elements.name: redisServerName
elements.label: Redis Cache Name
elements.toolTip: Globally unique name for the Azure Cache for Redis (3-63 lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-63 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, starting and ending with a letter or number.

elements.name: redisLocation
elements.label: Redis Region
elements.toolTip: Azure region for the Platform Redis cache. Defaults to the deployment region (same as AKS cluster).

elements.name: redisSkuName
elements.label: Azure Managed Redis SKU
elements.toolTip: SKU for the Azure Managed Redis instance. Balanced SKUs provide a good price/performance ratio.

elements.name: redisHost
elements.label: Redis Host
elements.toolTip: Hostname of the Redis cache server.

elements.name: redisPort
elements.label: Redis Port
elements.toolTip: Port number for the Redis server.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid port number.

elements.name: redisPassword
elements.toolTip: Redis password, if the server requires authentication.

elements.name: redisEnableTls
elements.label: Enable TLS for Redis
elements.toolTip: Enable TLS encryption when connecting to Redis. Recommended for Azure Cache for Redis.

elements.name: contactEmail
elements.label: Support Contact Email
elements.toolTip: Sender email address used for user support notifications.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid email address.

options.text: SMTP settings are required for email-based authentication and event notifications. You can leave these empty and configure them later via Helm values.

elements.name: smtpHost
elements.label: SMTP Host
elements.toolTip: SMTP server hostname.

elements.name: smtpPort
elements.label: SMTP Port
elements.toolTip: SMTP server port (e.g. 587 for TLS, 465 for SSL).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid port number or empty.

elements.name: smtpUser
elements.label: SMTP Username
elements.toolTip: Username for SMTP server authentication.

elements.name: smtpPassword
elements.toolTip: Password for SMTP server authentication.

options.text: Security seeds are used for JWT token signing and database encryption. If left empty, Helm will auto-generate random values. For production, provide stable values that persist across upgrades.

elements.name: jwtSeedString
elements.toolTip: Seed used to sign authentication tokens. Leave empty for auto-generation.

elements.name: cryptoSeedString
elements.toolTip: Seed used to encrypt sensitive data in the database. Must remain stable across upgrades. Leave empty for auto-generation.

elements.name: studiosEnabled
elements.label: Enable Studios
elements.toolTip: Enable Seqera Studios for interactive data analysis sessions (Jupyter, VS Code, RStudio).

elements.name: studiosDomain
elements.label: Studios Domain
elements.toolTip: Domain where the Studios service listens. Make sure the TLS certificate covers this and its wildcard subdomains.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid domain name.

options.text: Studios requires a dedicated Redis instance, separate from the Platform Redis. Like Platform, Studios only supports a non-clustered Redis endpoint. The auto-provisioned Azure Managed Redis instance uses the NoCluster topology.

elements.name: createNewStudiosRedis
elements.label: Automatically provision Azure Cache for Redis (Studios)
elements.toolTip: When checked, a new Azure Cache for Redis (Standard tier, non-clustered) will be created for Studios.

elements.name: studiosRedisServerName
elements.label: Studios Redis Cache Name
elements.toolTip: Globally unique name for the Studios Azure Cache for Redis.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-63 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, starting and ending with a letter or number.

elements.name: studiosRedisLocation
elements.label: Studios Redis Region
elements.toolTip: Azure region for the Studios Redis cache. Defaults to the deployment region (same as AKS cluster).

elements.name: studiosRedisSkuName
elements.label: Studios Azure Managed Redis SKU
elements.toolTip: SKU for the Studios Azure Managed Redis instance.

elements.name: studiosRedisHost
elements.label: Studios Redis Host
elements.toolTip: Hostname of the Redis server for Studios.

elements.name: studiosRedisPort
elements.label: Studios Redis Port
elements.toolTip: Port number for the Studios Redis server.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid port number.

elements.name: studiosRedisPassword
elements.toolTip: Redis password for Studios, if authentication is required.

elements.name: studiosRedisEnableTls
elements.label: Enable TLS for Studios Redis
elements.toolTip: Enable TLS encryption when connecting to the Studios Redis server.

elements.name: pipelineOptimizationEnabled
elements.label: Enable Pipeline Optimization
elements.toolTip: Enable the Pipeline Optimization service for automated resource tuning of Nextflow pipelines.

options.text: Pipeline Optimization requires its own dedicated MySQL database, separate from the Platform database.

elements.name: createNewPoDatabase
elements.label: Automatically provision Azure Database for MySQL (Pipeline Optimization)
elements.toolTip: When checked, a new Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server will be created for Pipeline Optimization.

elements.name: poMysqlServerName
elements.label: PO MySQL Server Name
elements.toolTip: Globally unique name for the Pipeline Optimization MySQL Flexible Server (3-63 lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-63 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, starting and ending with a letter or number.

elements.name: poMysqlLocation
elements.label: PO MySQL Server Region
elements.toolTip: Azure region for the Pipeline Optimization MySQL Flexible Server.

elements.name: poMysqlAdminUsername
elements.label: PO MySQL Admin Username
elements.toolTip: Administrator login for the Pipeline Optimization MySQL server.

constraints.validationMessage: Must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores (max 32 characters).

elements.name: poMysqlAdminPassword
elements.toolTip: Administrator password for the Pipeline Optimization MySQL server.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 8-128 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a digit, and a special character.

elements.name: poMysqlSkuName
elements.label: PO MySQL SKU
elements.toolTip: Compute SKU for the Pipeline Optimization MySQL Flexible Server. General Purpose SKUs use 4 GiB RAM per vCore; Memory Optimized SKUs use 8 GiB RAM per vCore.
elements.defaultValue: General Purpose – D4ds_v4 (4 vCores, 16 GiB RAM)

allowedValues.label: General Purpose – D4ds_v4 (4 vCores, 16 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D8ds_v4 (8 vCores, 32 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D16ds_v4 (16 vCores, 64 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D32ds_v4 (32 vCores, 128 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D48ds_v4 (48 vCores, 192 GiB RAM)
General Purpose – D64ds_v4 (64 vCores, 256 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E2ds_v4 (2 vCores, 16 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E4ds_v4 (4 vCores, 32 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E8ds_v4 (8 vCores, 64 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E16ds_v4 (16 vCores, 128 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E32ds_v4 (32 vCores, 256 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E48ds_v4 (48 vCores, 384 GiB RAM)
Memory Optimized – E64ds_v4 (64 vCores, 504 GiB RAM)

elements.name: poMysqlStorageSizeGB
elements.label: PO Storage Size (GiB)
elements.toolTip: Storage size for the Pipeline Optimization MySQL server in GiB.

elements.name: poMysqlDatabaseName
elements.label: Pipeline Optimization Database Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the database to create on the Pipeline Optimization MySQL server.

elements.name: poDbHost
elements.label: Pipeline Optimization MySQL Host
elements.toolTip: Hostname of the MySQL database server for Pipeline Optimization.

elements.name: poDbPort
elements.label: Pipeline Optimization MySQL Port
elements.toolTip: Port number for the Pipeline Optimization MySQL database.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid port number.

elements.name: poDbName
elements.label: Pipeline Optimization Database Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the MySQL database for Pipeline Optimization.

elements.name: poDbUsername
elements.label: Pipeline Optimization Database Username
elements.toolTip: MySQL database username for Pipeline Optimization.

elements.name: poDbPassword
elements.toolTip: MySQL database password for Pipeline Optimization.

elements.name: poDbEnableTls
elements.label: Enable TLS for Pipeline Optimization MySQL
elements.toolTip: Enable TLS encryption when connecting to the Pipeline Optimization MySQL database. Recommended for Azure Database for MySQL.

elements.name: poDbSslNoverify
elements.label: Skip TLS certificate verification (Pipeline Optimization MySQL)
elements.toolTip: Disable TLS certificate verification. Insecure — for development or testing only.

options.text: Pipeline Optimization also needs read access to the Platform database. The auto-provisioned MySQL server credentials from the Database Configuration step will be reused automatically.
Pipeline Optimization also needs read access to the Platform database to read pipeline and job details. A separate user with read-only permissions is recommended, but not required.

elements.name: poPlatformDbHost
elements.label: Platform MySQL Host (for Pipeline Optimization)
elements.toolTip: Hostname of the Platform MySQL database. Can be the same as the main Platform database.

elements.name: poPlatformDbPort
elements.label: Platform MySQL Port (for Pipeline Optimization)
elements.toolTip: Port number for the Platform MySQL database.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid port number.

elements.name: poPlatformDbName
elements.label: Platform Database Name (for Pipeline Optimization)
elements.toolTip: Name of the Platform MySQL database.

elements.name: poPlatformDbUsername
elements.label: Platform Database Username (for Pipeline Optimization)
elements.toolTip: MySQL username for Platform database access. A read-only user is sufficient.

elements.name: poPlatformDbPassword
elements.toolTip: MySQL password for Platform database access.

elements.name: poPlatformDbEnableTls
elements.label: Enable TLS for Platform MySQL (Pipeline Optimization)
elements.toolTip: Enable TLS encryption when connecting to the Platform MySQL database for Pipeline Optimization.

elements.name: poPlatformDbSslNoverify
elements.label: Skip TLS certificate verification (Platform MySQL for Pipeline Optimization)
elements.toolTip: Disable TLS certificate verification. Insecure — for development or testing only.
